betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Plutonium-238§f

§aHot plutonium isotope — perfect for RTG fuel pellets and self-charging batteries!§f

§bPlutonium-238§f is primarily obtained by breeding. It visibly glows from incandescence and is most useful as §bRTG fuel pellets§f.

§6Properties§f:
§b• Radioactivity§f: §e10.0§f RAD/s
§b• Proportion§f: §e33.3%§f of raw plutonium
§b• Acquisition§f: breeding from natural isotopes

§6Uses§f:
§b• RTG Pellet§f: §e10§f HE/tick. With decay: §e631M§f ticks (~1 year real, 131 in-game years). Decays to lead. §e6.3B§f HE total.
§b• RT Generator§f: fuel RTG furnaces and RT generators
§b• RTG Blast Furnace§f
§b• Minigun§f: crafting recipe
§b• Pu238Be RBMK Neutron Source§f
§b• Radio Isotope Cell§f: portable weak RTG
§b• Self-Charging Battery§f: §e100§f HE/tick
§b• Breeding§f: Pu-239
§b• Custom Nuke§f: §e1.15×§f multiplier

§6Trivia§f: Right-clicking with a pellet spouts random nuclear science facts!

§eTip§f: Pu-238 RTG pellets are the go-to for passive power. Each pellet lasts over a real year. Stack them in an RT Generator for maintenance-free power!
